title: Free NBA Picks & Predictions - Today’s Best NBA Bets

picks.selection: 3 LEG PARLAY Victor Wembanyama u27.5 Points Scored Victor Wembanyama u2.5 3-Pointers Made 3-Pointers Made Victor Wembanyama o3.5 Total Assists Total Assists +370
picks.analysis: Victor Wembanyama has long been reluctant to shoot from 3 on the road, and that showed up in Game 3, taking just four 3-pointers even though he made two of them. That reluctance should cost the Spurs both in scoring and in spacing, though Wembanyama may make up for it by handling the ball more often as he did in Game 3, six assists then coming in part because the starting San Antonio backcourt played too aggressively.

KAT did not take a 3-pointer in the first three quarters on Monday, and removing that threat allowed Wembanyama to expend less energy defensively. No wonder he played his most efficient game of the NBA Finals thus far. The Knicks coaching staff has undoubtedly pointed out to Towns the compound effect that comes with his offensive reluctance. If they want to put the San Antonio Spurs on the brink, then KAT needs to make Wembanyama stress on defense and thus cut into his offense.
